name: a rule applying to an application language is tagged for the full-stack development path
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/classify-path.sh" --rule-id g-ts-no-any --applies-to '{"linguist_aliases":["typescript"]}' 2>e.txt; grep -q 'development_paths=fullstack' e.txt && echo fullstack-rule-tagged 1>&2
